side_effects.description: Came down from MDMA/sass pressies faster than normal (~1 hour vs normal duration); LSD trip lasted only 8 hours instead of the normal ~14 hours; ketamine felt slightly reduced requiring more to achieve desired effect

protocol_notes: Used 2x250mg pressies (split sass and MDMA) on night 2 of a 4-day festival, and LSD on day 3. Currently on Retatrutide but dose not specified. Overall experience was still enjoyable but duration and intensity of recreational substances appeared reduced.
